characters.name: Ace
characters.description: AceFull nameAceFamilial InformationSignificant otherBlair HartmanAppearancesSeasonNight CountryFirst episodePart 1Last episodePart 4Portrayed byAron Már Ólafsson Aceis a crab worker who was involved withBlair Hartman. Ace was at work when he attackedBlair Hartman, his ex who had recently left him because he became abusive. In retaliation for him hurting Blair,Beehit him with a bucket and knocked him out. When he came to, Blair said she'd press charges, so he was arrested.

characters.name: Rose Aguineau
characters.description: Rose AguineauFull nameRose AguineauOccupationProfessorFamilial InformationSignificant otherTravis Cohle†AppearancesSeasonNight CountryFirst episodePart 1Last episodePart 6Portrayed byFiona Shaw Rose Aguineauis a local woman who found the bodies of the missing scientists. Rose was at home when she suddenly saw her dead lover,Travis Cohle, in the distance. After some time, she finally followed him to the bodies of the eight scientists who had disappeared from Tsalal Arctic Research Station. She called the police and reported the discovery, telling them that Travis found them.[1]

characters.name: Rose Aguineau
characters.description: Rose AguineauFull nameRose AguineauOccupationProfessorFamilial InformationSignificant otherTravis Cohle†AppearancesSeasonNight CountryFirst episodePart 1Last episodePart 6Portrayed byFiona Shaw Rose Aguineauis a local woman who found the bodies of the missing scientists. characters.name: Alma
characters.description: AlmaFull nameAlmaOccupationLighthouse ReceptionistAppearancesSeasonNight CountryFirst episodePart 3Last episodePart 6Portrayed byAnemarie Ottosen Almais the receptionist at The Lighthouse. Alma checked inJulia Navarrowhen she came to stay at The Lighthouse. After they finished the paperwork, she left Julia to her room.[1]

characters.name: Ledo Amarilla
characters.description: Ledo AmarillaResidenceVinci, California,  USOccupationPimp,Drug and gun dealerAppearancesSeason2Only Episode"Down Will Come"Portrayed byCesar GarciaLedo AmarillawasIrina's pimp and the leader of a crew that dealt in methamphetamine, prostitution and weapons trafficking in Vinci, California. He served as a minor antagonist in thesecond seasonofTrue Detective. Nothing is known about his early life although his name suggests he has Mexican heritage. After an investigation is launched into the death of corrupt city managerBen Caspere,Ray Velcoro,Ani BezzeridesandPaul Woodrughform a special investigative unit to determine the true circumstances around Caspere's death.

He attends the same school asWillandJulie Purcell.

characters.name: Beatrice Malee
characters.description: Beatrice MaleeFull nameBeatric MaleeOccupationCrab ProcessorAppearancesSeasonNight CountryFirst episodePart 1Last episodePart 6Portrayed byL'Xeis Diane Benson Beatrice "Bee" Maleeis a crab processer. When the women of the town, Bee among them, learned that the Tsalal scientists had killed Annie, they gathered together and went out to the station, where they gathered the men, drove them out into the wilderness, forced them to strip, and then sent them out into the snow for Annie to take them or not.[1]

characters.name: Beth
characters.description: BethFull nameBethAppearancesSeason1First episodeSeeing ThingsLast episodeHaunted HousesPortrayed byLili Simmons Bethwas a woman thatMarty Hartmet in 1995 during the Dora Lange case, and again in 2002. She ran away from her uncle when she was a minor, although why this was is left unclear, and became a prostitute at the Bunny Ranch near Spanish Lake. Dora Lange helped her when she first got started as a prostitute, enough that Beth was trusted with her things when Dora left. As Marty Hart left, he gave Beth some money to try and improve her life, though what Beth did with this particular money is not known.

characters.name: Ani Bezzerides
characters.description: Ani BezzeridesFull nameAntigone BezzeridesAliasAniPlace of birthSanta Cruz, California, USOccupationDetective Sergeant,Ventura County Sheriff's OfficeFamilial InformationChildrenChildParentsElliot Bezzerides(father)SiblingsAthena Bezzerides(sister)Significant otherRay Velcoro(lover)AppearancesSeason2First episode"The Western Book of the Dead"Last episode"Omega Station"Portrayed byRachel McAdamsAntigone "Ani" Bezzeridesis a Ventura County Sheriff’s detective. She is one of the main characters in thesecond seasonofTrue Detective. Bezzerides is a Ventura County Sheriff CID who is often at odds with the system she serves. A bizarre murder brings her together withtwo otherlaw-enforcement officersand acareer criminal, each of whom must navigate a web of conspiracy and betrayal in the scorched landscapes of California.Elvis Ilincais her current partner in Ventura's County Police. In childhood Ani and her sisterAthenawere abandoned by her mother. She was in the "Good People" commune with her fatherElliot. Ani was in group with other 4 unknown people from whom 2 ended up in jail and other 2 committed suicide. It's possible that she was sexually abused in her childhood.

characters.name: Ani Bezzerides

characters.name: Athena Bezzerides
characters.description: Athena BezzeridesOccupationWebcam modelProstituteArtistFamilial InformationParentsElliot Bezzerides(father)SiblingsAni Bezzerides(sister)AppearancesSeason2First episode"The Western Book of the Dead"Last episode"Black Maps and Motel Rooms"Portrayed byLeven RambinAthena Bezzeridesis a web-camera performer or asAnistates - avant-garde cinema performer who does sex acts for paying customers. A former drug addict, she is encountered by her sister at a legitimate brothel during Ani's line of duty following a wrong tip-off. It is later shown that Athena is saving money to take up an arts course in California Institute of the Arts. An artist by passion, she makes sand and miniature sculptures.

characters.name: Athena Bezzerides
characters.description: Athena BezzeridesOccupationWebcam modelProstituteArtistFamilial InformationParentsElliot Bezzerides(father)SiblingsAni Bezzerides(sister)AppearancesSeason2First episode"The Western Book of the Dead"Last episode"Black Maps and Motel Rooms"Portrayed byLeven RambinAthena Bezzeridesis a web-camera performer or asAnistates - avant-garde cinema performer who does sex acts for paying customers. characters.name: Elliot Bezzerides
characters.description: Elliot BezzeridesFamilial InformationChildrenAni Bezzerides(Daughter)Athena Bezzerides(Daughter)AppearancesSeason2First episode"The Western Book of the Dead"Last episode"Black Maps and Motel Rooms"Portrayed byDavid MorseElliot Bezzeridesis a yogi lecturer who travels around the world. He is also the father ofAniandAthena Bezzerides. Elliot andDocdid social theory work in a commune called "Good People" at some point in the past.Aniwas also connected to this commune and used to be there as a kid. Elliot mentioned that he remembers Doc, and that he was around in the early 90's researching the dynamics of communal living.Doc,Austin Chessani,Tony Chessaniand other unidentified members (possiblyBen Casperealso) were part ofChessani lodge. He remembers that Ben used to attend seminars but never talked. It's not unlikely that Elliot and Chessani Lodge could have been connected because a lot of spiritual movements crossed paths in the area back in that day. Elliot points out thatRayhas one of  the largest auras (green and black color) he has ever seen and Ray must have had hundreds of lives.

characters.name: Bob
characters.description: BobFull nameBobOccupationLighthouse NurseAppearancesSeasonNight CountryFirst episodePart 4Last episodePart 5Portrayed byAtli Magnússon Bobis a nurse at The Lighthouse. Bob was working at the desk at The Lighthouse whenEvangeline Navarrocame in. She was angry and asked how Bob could just let Julia walk out of the building. Bob went to check the computer and Navarro realized he didn't even know Julia had left. He told her it was a voluntary facility, not a detention center and she told him it was a terrible facility because they just let people die. She kicked some things around and then left.[1]

characters.description: John BowenOccupationFBI AgentAppearancesSeason3First episode"Kiss Tomorrow Goodbye"Last episode"If You Have Ghosts"Portrayed byMichael BroderickJohn Bowenis a recurring character inSeason 3ofTrue Detectiveplayed byMichael Broderick. Special Agent Bowen is an FBI Agent assigned to assist with the case surrounding the disappearance ofWillandJulie Purcellalongside Special AgentBurt Diller. To be added

Frankie is a teenager who sawWillandJulie Purcellprior to their disappearance in 1980. He is questioned byWayne HaysandRoland West. To be added

characters.name: James Boyle
characters.description: James BoyleFamilial InformationChildrenRonnie BoyleAppearancesSeason3First episode"The Great War and Modern Memory"Last episode"The Big Never"Portrayed byNick Basta James Boyleis a recurring character inSeason 3ofTrue Detectiveplayed byNick Basta. James is the father ofRonnie Boyle. On the day thatWillandJulie Purcellwent missing, they had told theirfatherthey were going to Ronnie's to see his new puppy. When the children did not return, Tom called James to find out if his children were at his house. In 1980, James was at home with his son,Ronnieand their new puppy whenTom Purcellcalled the house. He was looking for his children,WillandJulie. They had left their house earlier in the day claiming they were going to Ronnie's house to play with the new puppy. James asked Ronnie if the Purcell kids had been to the house, but Ronnie had not seen them. James promised to call Tom if he heard anything about the kids.

characters.name: James Boyle
characters.description: James BoyleFamilial InformationChildrenRonnie BoyleAppearancesSeason3First episode"The Great War and Modern Memory"Last episode"The Big Never"Portrayed byNick Basta James Boyleis a recurring character inSeason 3ofTrue Detectiveplayed byNick Basta. James asked Ronnie if the Purcell kids had been to the house, but Ronnie had not seen them. James promised to call Tom if he heard anything about the kids.

characters.name: Ronnie Boyle
characters.description: Ronnie BoyleFamilial InformationParentsJames Boyle(father)AppearancesSeason3First episode"The Great War and Modern Memory"Last episode"The Big Never"Portrayed byLennon Morgan Ronnie Boyleis a recurring character inSeason 3ofTrue Detectiveplayed byLennon Morgan. Ronnie is a classmate ofWill Purcelland the son ofJames Boyle. On the day that Will and his sisterJuliewent missing, they had told theirfatherthey were going to Ronnie's to see his new puppy. Ronnie had no knowledge of this, having only told them that they could visit but not at a specific time. In 1980, Ronnie was a classmate ofWill Purcell. When Ronnie got a new puppy, he told Will that he could come by and see it sometime. On the night of November 7, Ronnie's fatherJamesgot a telephone call fromTom Purcellasking if his children were at the Boyle home. Will and his sisterJuliewere missing and had told their father they were going to Ronnie's to see the new puppy. Ronnie told his father they had not been by the house, nor was he expecting them.

characters.name: Gena Brune
characters.description: Gena BruneFamilial InformationChildrenChad Velcoro-BruneSignificant otherRichard Brune(husband)Ray Velcoro(ex-husband,)AppearancesSeason2First episode"Night Finds You"Last episode"Omega Station"Portrayed byAbigail SpencerGena BruneisRay Velcoro's former wife who now is married toRichard Brune. At some point of her married life with Ray, she was raped. It seems like Ray paid back by killing the perpetrators. And it's also unknown if Ray is her son's real father, and not the rapist. Gena receives a paternity test letter in which it's stated that there's a 99.9% chance that Ray Velcoro is her son's father.

characters.name: Richard Brune
characters.description: Richard BruneFamilial InformationSignificant otherGena BruneAppearancesSeason2First episodeThe Western Book of the DeadLast episodeOther LivesPortrayed byChristian Campbell Richard Bruneis the current husband ofGena Brune. TBA

characters.name: Adam Bryce
characters.description: Adam BryceFull nameAdam BryceOccupationGeologist/TeacherAppearancesSeasonNight CountryFirst episodePart 2Last episodePart 4Portrayed byDonnie Keshawarz Adam Bryceis a teacher who has a personal relationship withLiz Danvers. Bryce was teaching a class whenLiz Danverscame in and dismissed his students over his objections. Once the students were gone, she asked him to explain to her what Tsalal Station was doing. He told her to go ask the scientists there, but she told them that wasn't possible because most of them were dead and she was trying to figure out what happened to them. He told her that they were trying to sequence the DNA of an extinct microorganism that could potentially stop cellular decay, curing several diseases. But he was sure it would never work, because there were so many ways it could go wrong. He also found it odd that the scientists were so reclusive and never rotated crews.[1]

characters.name: Becks Bryce
characters.description: Becks BryceFull nameBecks BryceFamilial InformationSignificant otherAdam BryceAppearancesSeasonNight CountryOnly EpisodePart 4Portrayed bySara Dögg Ásgeirsdóttir Becks Bryceis the wife ofAdam Bryce. Becks answered the door whenEvangeline NavarroandLiz Danverscame to talk to her husband, Adam. When she saw Danvers, she immediately left the room. later, while Adam talked to Danvers and Navarro, she came into the room, prompting him to say they needed to leave.

characters.description: Jay BundaResidenceWhite Finger, Arkansas, USOccupationBar managerAppearancesSeason3First episode"The Hour and the Day"Last episode"The Final Country"Portrayed byGreg BryanJay Bundais a recurring character inSeason 3ofTrue Detectiveplayed byGreg Bryan. Jay ran the local bar in White Finger whereLucy Purcellworked. After the disappearance of his children,Tom Purcellgot drunk in the bar and tried to assault Jay who he believed was having an affair with his wife. To be added

characters.name: Kevin Burris
characters.description: Kevin BurrisResidenceVinci, California, USOccupationDetective,Vinci Police DepartmentAppearancesSeason2First episode"The Western Book of the Dead"Last episode"Omega Station"Portrayed byJames FrainLt. Kevin Burrisis a corrupt detective of the Vinci Police Department and ChiefWilliam Holloway's right-hand man. He is most known for personally killingPaul Woodrughand serves as the tertiary antagonist in the second season ofTrue Detective. In the episode finale, Burris killsRay Velcoroand is the only major antagonist who survives the events of True Detective. AfterAni Bezzeridespasses to a journalist incriminating evidence, which proves that Burris, Holloway, Dixon and Caspere were behind the robbery and murder in 1992 and that they are all corrupt, it appears likely that Burris will be investigated at some point for his crimes and that he will pay for what he did to Paul and Ray.

characters.name: Aviaq Carter
characters.description: Aviaq CarterFull nameAviaq CarterFamilial InformationChildrenSon †Significant otherJoe Carter(husband)AppearancesSeasonNight CountryOnly EpisodePart 3Portrayed byAviaaja Arens Aviaq Carteris a mother whose baby was stillborn. Aviaq was pregnant and when she went into labor, her son was stillborn. This was believed to be a result of the mine in Ennis. She and some of the other women in town held a memorial for her son.

characters.name: Ben Caspere
characters.description: Ben CaspereResidenceVinci, California, USOccupationCity ManagerAppearancesSeason2Only Episode"The Western Book of the Dead"Portrayed byBo McCann(uncredited)Ben Caspereis the former corrupt city manager ofVinci. His disappearance has triggered a series of events involving all the major characters of the series. Caspere was visiting Doc for about 3 years. He was treated for neurosis, anxiety, painful past and guilt. Caspere and Frank Semyon met each other at some unspecified point in the past. He was holding Frank's money with which he was supposed to buy land in which mass railway was supposed to be constructed. He was tortured and eventually killed byCrowand because of that, the land was never purchased. Ben Caspere suddenly goes missing. His phone has been shut off and the Mayor is on DEFCON. Velcoro and his partner are put on the case. A recently appointed secretary to Ben Caspere is interrogated by the duo at his office. She provides valuable input of his frequent visitation to Montorey Hills and the Russian River Valley in Sonoma but assures he never takes off without prior notice. The next scene of investigation leads to Caspere's residence which reveals another side to the story.

characters.name: Stacy Chalmers
characters.description: Stacy ChalmersFull nameStacy ChalmersFamilial InformationChildrenAt least one childSignificant otherHank PriorAppearancesSeasonNight CountryOnly EpisodePart 1Portrayed byÓlafía Hrönn Jónsdóttir Stacy Chalmersis a local woman who struggles with alcohol. Stacy was driving when she slid on ice and hit a pole after spinning around.Liz Danverscame to her aid and was enraged because Stacy was drunk and driving on a suspended license. She arrested Stacy and sent her to jail. At the jail, Stacy screamed repeatedly in an attempt to annoy them into letting her go.Hank Priorattempted to release her only for Danvers to step in and have her put back in the cell, saying she was still drunk.

characters.name: Austin Chessani
characters.description: Austin ChessaniResidenceVinci, California, USOccupationMayor,Crime BossFamilial InformationChildrenTony ChessaniBetty ChessaniSignificant otherHelene(ex-wife, divorced)Veronica Chessani(wife)AppearancesSeason2First episode"The Western Book of the Dead"Last episode"Omega Station"Portrayed byRitchie CosterAustin Chessaniwas the mayor of The City OfVinciinSeason 2ofTrue Detective. Arrogant, corrupt, and rarely sober; Austin Chessani has been the acting mayor ofVincifor a number of years and as such has a hand in every illegitimate dealing occurring within his constituency, creating a virtual fiefdom for himself and his friends both political and otherwise. Chessani considers his family to be a "political dynasty" akin to that of the Kennedys and "lives in the biggest house on the street in Bel Air", but his personal life is in a significant state of disarray; witha perpetually intoxicated trophy wife, anemotionally distant daughter, and asecretive son finding his way up the ladder of a non-political hierarchy.

characters.name: Errol Childress
characters.description: Errol ChildressFull nameErrol William ChildressAliasThe Man With The ScarsGreen-Eared Spaghetti MonsterOccupationLandscaperFamilial InformationParentsBilly Childress(father)OthersSam Tuttle(paternal grandfather)Elizabeth Childress(paternal grandmother)Billy Lee Tuttle(paternal half-uncle)AppearancesSeason1First episode"The Locked Room"Last episode"Form and Void"Portrayed byGlenn Fleshler Green-Eared Spaghetti Monster Errol Childressis a serial killer and a follower of the twisted and brutalTuttle cult, operating in Lousiana. Childress is the primary antagonist of thefirst seasonofTrue Detective. Errol Childress was a deranged, sadistic, and psychopathic fanatic of the Yellow King, melded by years of mental and sexual abuse and indoctrination at an early age. He was part of a generation of children raised by the cult to be ruthless killers In spite of his murderous behaviour, Errol was by no means insane; being somewhat unhinged in his actions but, intellectually, Errol was frighteningly intelligent and self-educated.

characters.name: Blake Churchman
characters.description: Blake ChurchmanOccupationCrime Lieutenant,PimpAppearancesSeason2First episode"The Western Book of the Dead"Last episode"Black Maps and Motel Rooms"Portrayed byChristopher James BakerBlake ChurchmanwasFrank Semyon's treacherous right-hand man and a double agent, working forOsip Agronov. He serves as the quaternary antagonist in the second season ofTrue Detective. Blake handles the newspaper article about supposed corruption inVincitoFrank. He gets scolded by Frank for saying that state investigation won't touch his business. Later Blake attends railway presentation ball and informs thatBenhasn't been in his office for 2 days. Blake accompanied Frank to his meeting withDanny Santosat "Lux Infinitum" club.
